summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of WinDesk Cloud onboarding system. All onboarding endpoints working correctly with proper flow validation.
passed_tests: GET /api/onboarding/status - correctly returns is_new_customer=true for new users
POST /api/onboarding/organization - successfully saves organization name and domain
POST /api/onboarding/admin - confirms admin user setup and updates user data
POST /api/onboarding/complete - marks onboarding as finished and creates default group
GET /api/onboarding/summary - returns complete onboarding data for review
POST /api/onboarding/complete-tour - marks guided tour as completed
Onboarding status correctly differentiates between new and existing customers
Full onboarding flow from registration to completion works end-to-end
All 30 general backend API endpoints working correctly
